context: Evaluate a bun:test test suite for correct API usage, coverage of validation cases, and proper mocking

checklist.name: bun:test imports used exclusively
checklist.description: The test file imports describe, it, expect, and mock (or spyOn) from 'bun:test'; no Jest, Vitest, or Mocha imports

checklist.name: Happy path test present
checklist.description: At least one test verifies that loadConfig returns a correctly typed AppConfig when given a valid config; asserts port, logLevel, and databaseUrl values

checklist.name: File not found error tested
checklist.description: A test verifies that loadConfig throws an error matching 'Config file not found' when the file does not exist; uses expect(...).rejects or try/catch with expect

checklist.name: All three validation failure cases tested
checklist.description: Separate tests cover: invalid port type, invalid logLevel value, and missing/empty databaseUrl; each asserts the correct error message

checklist.name: Bun.file mocked to avoid real filesystem access
checklist.description: The test file uses mock() or spyOn() to intercept Bun.file calls and return controlled test doubles; tests do not read actual files from disk

checklist.name: describe/it structure used
checklist.description: Tests are organized with describe blocks and it test cases; test names are descriptive
